alpha_policy.correction_class_note: Same multiple-testing correction CLASS that gave D-002H its alpha = 0.05/216 = 2.31e-4. Here denominator = 102 canonical cells -> alpha = 4.901961e-04.
alpha_policy.derivation: sum over 3 P5 substrates of (applicable P6 nulls x P5-declared P2 windows x P5 metrics) = funding_liquidity_rollover: 6 nulls x 3 windows x 2 metrics = 36 ; cross_exposure_contagion_proxy: 7 nulls x 3 windows x 2 metrics = 42 ; volatility_credit_spread_regime: 6 nulls x 2 windows x 2 metrics = 24 ; TOTAL = 102 canonical cells -> Bonferroni alpha = 0.05/102 = 4.901961e-04

claim_boundary: P7 is a power-DESIGN gate. It computes MDE, n_min, runtime budget and false-negative risk and decides whether a canonical sweep is LEGAL under a realistic budget. It does NOT execute a canonical run (P8), promote any claim (P9), fit real data, or edit the D-002J pre-registration. A POWER_GATE_REFUSED_UNDERPOWERED verdict is a truthful retained negative artifact -- a scientific win, not a failure to fix.
d002i_anchor_note: D-002I diagnosis (H_I3 CONFIRMED) median n_min ~= 93 at alpha=0.05/216=2.31e-4. P7 references this number as the sanity tie-point for the feasible-cap justification and the refusal axis.

cross_exposure_contagion_proxy.rationale: Prior for 'cross_exposure_contagion_proxy' sourced from P4 'PC2_CONTAGION_CASCADE_INJECTION' (control_class='contagion_cascade'); P4 pass-threshold metric='cascade_extent_fraction' value=0.3 is the planted synthetic ground-truth detection magnitude. D-002I diagnosed the realistic per-cell substrate-vs-null separation as sub-threshold relative to that idealized synthetic SNR, so the magnitude is mapped to a conservative shrink-only standardized Cohen's d = 0.3 (never inflated; can only push the gate toward REFUSED). No effect size is invented.

funding_liquidity_rollover.rationale: Prior for 'funding_liquidity_rollover' sourced from P4 'PC1_LIQUIDITY_SHOCK_INJECTION' (control_class='liquidity_shock'); P4 pass-threshold metric='worst_node_post_onset_mean_shift_z' value=5 is the planted synthetic ground-truth detection magnitude. D-002I diagnosed the realistic per-cell substrate-vs-null separation as sub-threshold relative to that idealized synthetic SNR, so the magnitude is mapped to a conservative shrink-only standardized Cohen's d = 0.5 (never inflated; can only push the gate toward REFUSED). No effect size is invented.

volatility_credit_spread_regime.rationale: Prior for 'volatility_credit_spread_regime' sourced from P4 'PC4_MARKET_WIDE_VOLATILITY_REGIME_SWITCH' (control_class='volatility_regime_switch'); P4 pass-threshold metric='post_pre_realised_vol_ratio' value=2 is the planted synthetic ground-truth detection magnitude. D-002I diagnosed the realistic per-cell substrate-vs-null separation as sub-threshold relative to that idealized synthetic SNR, so the magnitude is mapped to a conservative shrink-only standardized Cohen's d = 0.4 (never inflated; can only push the gate toward REFUSED). No effect size is invented.

false_negative_risk.interpretation: at_capped_budget = worst-cell type-II error if the sweep ran at feasible_cap_n_seeds; at_n_min = residual type-II error at each cell's own n_min (~= 1 - power_target).

feasible_cap_justification: D-002H ran at n_seeds=20 and REFUSED; D-002I diagnosed the median n_min~=93 (alpha=0.05/216). feasible_cap_n_seeds=100 is set just above the D-002I median anchor (93) and 5x the D-002H budget (20) -- the MOST generous per-cell budget that is still runtime-affordable. It is NOT inflated to manufacture a PASS.
refusal_reason: 102/102 canonical benchmark cells have n_min > feasible_cap_n_seeds=100 at the Bonferroni alpha; the realistic budget cannot reach power>=0.8 for the P4-sourced effect priors. This is the SAME failure mode D-002I diagnosed for D-002H (n_seeds=20 vs median n_min~=93). Loosening alpha, inflating the effect prior, or shrinking the grid to force a PASS is forbidden. Lineage halts at P7; next legal node is a fresh D-002K pre-registration designed against this axis.
refusal_rule: POWER-FIRST FAIL-CLOSED RULE: canonical_run_authorized is True IFF, for EVERY designated canonical benchmark cell, n_min(effect_prior, alpha_bonferroni, power=0.8) <= feasible_cap_n_seeds AND the total runtime budget at feasible_cap_n_seeds is finite. The effect-size prior comes ONLY from P4 positive-control ground-truth magnitudes under a documented shrink-only attenuation; alpha is the Bonferroni split over the explicit canonical-cell count; the cell grid is the full P5xP6xP2xmetric product. If any benchmark cell has n_min > feasible_cap_n_seeds the gate emits POWER_GATE_REFUSED_UNDERPOWERED, status TERMINAL_REFUSED, canonical_run_authorized False, halts the lineage at P7 (next legal = a fresh D-002K pre-registration), and retains this report as a truthful negative artifact. The gate NEVER loosens alpha, inflates the effect prior, or shrinks the grid to manufacture a PASS -- that is the exact self-deception D-002I diagnosed as the D-002H root cause.

runtime_budget.cloud_assumption: GCP c3-highcpu 88-core CPU-bound (NOT GPU) @ 85% efficiency; $300 GCP credit context
